_meta.description: First 250 enrollment tracking - controls enrollment counter displays and availability status across the website

whenToEdit: When new visitors enroll in the First 250 program
When correcting enrollment count after verification
whenNotToEdit: Program details or descriptions (edit first-250 page content instead)
staffInstructions.howToEdit: On GitHub: Navigate to data/enrollment.json > Click pencil icon > Update currentEnrolled number > Click 'Commit changes'
importantNotes: When program fills up (currentEnrolled = totalSpots), website shows 'SOLD OUT' messaging
Double-check enrollment numbers before updating - this displays publicly

currentEnrolled.description: Number of visitors currently enrolled in the First 250 program
currentEnrolled.displayLocation: First 250 page, homepage counter, enrollment CTAs

totalSpots.description: Maximum number of spots available in the First 250 program
totalSpots.note: Should only change if program capacity is officially modified

note.description: Internal reminder for editors (not displayed on website)

validation.totalSpots: Must be a positive integer, typically 250

display.urgency: May show urgency messaging when spotsRemaining < 50

commonMistakes: Setting currentEnrolled higher than totalSpots (causes negative 'spots remaining')
Forgetting to update after enrollment event
Using approximate numbers instead of verified count
Updating without checking against actual enrollment records

_aiRules.description: Rules for AI assistants editing this file
beforeEditing: ALWAYS verify changes with user before committing
ALWAYS confirm enrollment numbers come from official source
prohibited: Do NOT make changes without user awareness
Do NOT guess enrollment numbers - must be from verified source
fileSpecific: This is a simple counter file - only two numbers matter: currentEnrolled and totalSpots
Enrollment drives urgency messaging - inaccurate numbers affect visitor decisions
When program is sold out, website behavior changes automatically
Ask user to confirm enrollment numbers before updating
_aiRules.whenUnsure: Ask the user for the verified enrollment count from official records

note: Update this file when enrollment changes. All pages pull from here.
